completionNextSteps: You can jump back to the dashboard or review your updated progress before starting another session.
correctAnswerFeedback: Correct. Your XP has been added for this question.
couldNotSubmitAnswer: Could not submit your answer. Please try again.
difficultyPromptDescription: Your rating feeds the next interval for this item.
explanationVideoDescription: Open the supporting explanation for this question in a new tab.
howSessionWorksDescription: Answer each question, then rate how easy recall felt so the scheduler can adapt future reviews.
incorrectAnswerFeedback: Not quite. The selected option has been recorded as incorrect.
keepMomentumDescription: XP is awarded as you move through the set, so even short sessions still push progress forward.
noQuestionsAvailable: No questions available right now. Try again later.
practiceIntroDescription: Start an adaptive FSRS session and we will pull the next questions from your learner queue without changing the rest of the site structure.
ratingTip: Use the rating buttons after each answer honestly. That is what keeps the next session size and spacing reasonable.
reflectDescription: After each answer, rate how hard recall felt so FSRS can tune the next interval.
sessionCompleteDescription: Your practice session is finished. The results have been sent back into the review schedule so the next queue can stay aligned.
sessionDetailsDescription: Small, useful telemetry instead of a second oversized panel.
solveDescription: Choose one answer for each question, then rate recall before moving forward.
